author: asc3nd3r
content:
Built an open source attestation layer for AI agents.

Problem: When agents call other agents, there is no standard way to verify identity, check permissions, or prove compliance.

Attestix solves this with W3C DIDs, Verifiable Credentials, UCAN delegation chains, and automated EU AI Act compliance. Works as an MCP server with 47 tools.

https://github.com/VibeTensor/attestix
pip install attestix

Apache 2.0. Feedback and contributions welcome.
